Title Review Summary — Rodriguez (2025-FC-08891)

Property: 15201 SW 88th Ave, Palmetto Bay, FL 33157

The title search reveals the following items:

1. Mortgage: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. — $445,000.00, recorded February 15, 2021.
2. Assignment: Mortgage assigned to Nationstar Mortgage LLC d/b/a Mr. Cooper, recorded September 14, 2025.
3. HOA Lien: Palmetto Bay Homeowners Association — $3,420.00, recorded January 22, 2026.
4. Property taxes for 2025 are unpaid ($8,247.00).
5. Easement for Florida Power & Light Company.

No unsatisfied judgments or tax liens found against the borrower.
operator_edited_version:
Title Review Summary — Rodriguez (2025-FC-08891)

Property: 15201 SW 88th Ave, Palmetto Bay, FL 33157
County: Miami-Dade | State: Florida
Effective Date: February 28, 2026

LIENS & ENCUMBRANCES

1. First Mortgage — Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
   Original Amount: $445,000.00
   Dated: February 8, 2021 | Recorded: February 15, 2021
   Instrument No.: 2021-0123456
   Status: ASSIGNED (see #2)

2. Assignment of Mortgage — to Nationstar Mortgage LLC d/b/a Mr. Cooper
   Recorded: September 14, 2025
   Instrument No.: 2025-0891234
   Note: Active servicing transfer effective April 1, 2026. Current servicer is still Wells Fargo until transfer date.

3. HOA Lis Pendens — Palmetto Bay Homeowners Association, Inc.
   Amount: $3,420.00 (unpaid assessments)
   Filed: January 22, 2026
   Instrument No.: 2026-0034567
   ACTION REQUIRED: Evaluate whether HOA must be named as party defendant in foreclosure complaint. Lis pendens creates a junior lien interest.

TAX STATUS

   2024 Taxes: PAID ($7,891.00)
   2025 Taxes: DELINQUENT — $8,247.00 (due November 1, 2025)
   Tax Parcel: 33-5022-014-0290
   Special Assessment: $1,200.00/year — Current

OWNERSHIP

   Current Vesting: Carlos A. Rodriguez, a single man (fee simple)
   Prior Owner: Maria Santos (conveyed via warranty deed, 2015)
   Santos mortgage fully satisfied prior to conveyance (Instrument 2015-0567890)

OTHER MATTERS

   - FPL easement for electrical transmission (O.R. Book 18924, Page 445)
   - Restrictive covenants (O.R. Book 12031, Page 892, as amended)
   - No unsatisfied judgments, federal tax liens, or state tax liens

REVIEWER NOTES

   - Delinquent 2025 taxes must be addressed before sale
   - HOA lis pendens requires attorney review for party naming decision
   - Verify assignment chain is complete before filing complaint
key_edits: Added county, state, and effective date to header
Organized into labeled sections (LIENS, TAX STATUS, OWNERSHIP, OTHER MATTERS, REVIEWER NOTES)
Added instrument numbers and recording details for every lien — system omitted these
Added lien position context ('First Mortgage') and status ('ASSIGNED')
Flagged HOA lis pendens with ACTION REQUIRED — system just listed it passively
Separated tax information into its own section with delinquency status highlighted
Added reviewer notes section with actionable items the attorney should address
Included the Santos mortgage satisfaction to show clean chain of title
Cross-referenced the servicing transfer from the servicer email

operator_edited_version:
Case Status Memo — Rodriguez (2025-FC-08891)
Prepared: March 16, 2026

Borrower: Carlos A. Rodriguez
Property: 15201 SW 88th Ave, Palmetto Bay, FL 33157 (Miami-Dade County, FL)
Servicer: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. → Nationstar Mortgage LLC d/b/a Mr. Cooper (effective April 1, 2026)
Borrower's Counsel: Rafael Mendez, Mendez & Associates, (305) 555-0312
Court: Circuit Court, 11th Judicial Circuit, Miami-Dade County
Case No.: 2026-CA-003891
Judge: Hon. Patricia Navarro

Current Status: Pre-filing — complaint not yet filed

ACTION ITEMS (by priority)

1. URGENT — Resubmit all pending fee authorizations to Mr. Cooper after April 1. Wells Fargo will reject any invoices after transfer date.
2. URGENT — File proof of service on all named defendants by April 15, 2026 (court deadline).
3. HIGH — File case management report by April 12, 2026 (10 days before conference). Report must include: service status, pending motions, trial readiness estimate, mediation status.
4. HIGH — Review HOA lis pendens ($3,420.00) — determine whether Palmetto Bay HOA must be named as party defendant before complaint is filed.
5. NORMAL — Update payoff amount in system: $487,920.00 as of March 1, 2026.
6. NORMAL — Route all borrower communications through attorney Rafael Mendez going forward.

UPCOMING DEADLINES

   April 1, 2026 — Servicer transfer effective (redirect all billing/correspondence to Mr. Cooper)
   April 12, 2026 — Case Management Report due (court requirement)
   April 15, 2026 — Proof of service on all defendants due (court order)
   April 22, 2026 — Case Management Conference, 10:00 AM, Courtroom 5-3, Judge Navarro

TITLE CONCERNS

   - 2025 property taxes delinquent ($8,247.00) — must be addressed before sale
   - HOA lis pendens junior lien — needs party naming decision
   - Assignment chain from Wells Fargo to Nationstar should be verified as complete

NOTES

   - Updated payoff from servicer email: $487,920.00 as of 3/1/2026
   - All future correspondence to new servicer address: 8950 Cypress Waters Blvd, Dallas, TX 75019
key_edits: Added preparation date, court details, judge name, and case number from court order
Added borrower's counsel information from servicer email
Replaced flat 'recent developments' list with prioritized ACTION ITEMS ranked by urgency
Cross-referenced deadlines from court order with specific filing requirements
Added title concerns section pulling from title search documents
Included servicer contact details and payoff amount from email
Made deadlines actionable — not just dates but what needs to happen by each date
Connected information across all documents (title + email + court order) into a unified picture
